introSection: Wild West Mine Train was a steel roller coaster located at Ocean Park in Hong Kong Island, Hong Kong, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Virtual reality headsets were added to Wild West Mine Train in December 2017. The experience took riders through a virtual rainforest. During the roller coaster, riders could interact with their surroundings by turning their head to capture animals.

Wild West Mine Train closed on 31 August 2021 along with Abyss and Raging River. It remains standing but not operating. The park plans to re-use the ride's dome structure as part of a new adventure park set to open in 2028.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an engine.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Wild West Mine Train on the parks website

fullText:
Wild West Mine Train was a steel roller coaster located at Ocean Park in Hong Kong Island, Hong Kong, China.

Virtual reality headsets were added to Wild West Mine Train in December 2017. The experience took riders through a virtual rainforest. During the roller coaster, riders could interact with their surroundings by turning their head to capture animals.

Wild West Mine Train closed on 31 August 2021 along with Abyss and Raging River. It remains standing but not operating. The park plans to re-use the ride's dome structure as part of a new adventure park set to open in 2028.



Sand track and cyan supports.

The train is designed to resemble an engine.


 * Wild West Mine Train on the parks website
